scripts.build: vite build && cp dist/app.html dist/index.html && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.build:pages: GITHUB_PAGES=true VITE_STATIC_API=true vite build && cp dist/app.html dist/index.html && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && npm run sync:pages-root
scripts.sync:pages-root: rm -rf assets && cp -R dist/assets assets && cp dist/index.html index.html
